headlines.headline: Wyrnor Solutions Chief Operating Officer addresses investor concerns in open letter

sentiment.reasoning: An open letter from the COO addressing investor concerns is a reactive measure that typically signals internal instability or market skepticism.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
